category_sources: Official RabbitMQ docs describe rabbitmqadmin v2 as a command-line tool for RabbitMQ HTTP API operations.
source_facts.description says it is a RabbitMQ command-line tool using the HTTP API.
display_name_sources: Official RabbitMQ docs title the tool rabbitmqadmin v2.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official RabbitMQ management CLI documentation URL.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/rabbitmq/rabbitmqadmin-ng; per instruction, repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official RabbitMQ docs list management operations exposed through rabbitmqadmin.
source_facts.description identifies a command-line RabbitMQ HTTP API tool.
